generic_rules: Focus repairs on resolving AGREE syntax errors reported by the validator.
Prioritize repairs that address unresolved identifiers or type mismatches.
Ensure all AGREE contracts are contained within `annex agree { ... };` blocks.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use `int`, `real`, and `bool` for AGREE scalar type declarations.
Helper declarations (e.g., `eq`, `const`) must have valid types.
Ensure all identifiers used in AGREE contracts are visible in the AADL model.
anti_patterns: Do not introduce new AADL architecture to fix AGREE contract errors.
Avoid using package-qualified identifiers in generated AGREE code.
Do not attempt to repair contracts referencing implementation-level details in component type annexes.
